titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 166: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 166. (A.R. No. 356 of 1924.) MĒLAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAIYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, Agastyēsvara shrine, Agastyēśvara temple.

Records that Aḍigaḷ Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar Kaṇḍaṉ Maṟavaṉār gave the village Uṟattūr in Kuṉṟak-kūṟṟam, after changing its name into Karuppūr and removing the erstwhile holders of land in that village, as kāṇi and as janmabhūmi (place of his birth) to Vēṅkaḍavaṉ Araṅgaṉ alias Sembiyaṉ Viṟai-nāṭṭukōn, a native of Karuppūr and after settling the permanent tax (nilai iṟai) payable per year at twenty-five tālaichchemmai poṉ. The nāṭṭār of Kuṉṟak-kūṟṟam were asked to give effect to the above order and they did so. There is a mention of miscellaneous taxes (siṟṟiṟai) but the context in which it occurs is not clear on account of the damaged nature of the inscription.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 378.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmarkku yā
ṇṭu 10 5Āvatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu nāṭ
ṭomukku Aṭikaḷ paḻaveṭṭaraiyar kaṇṭaṉma
ṟavaṉār Innāṭṭu Uṟattūrp paḻam
perum paḻaṅkuṭiyūm nikki karuppūru
ṭaiya veṅkaṭavaṉ Araṅkaṉāṉa cem
piyaṉ viṟaināṭṭu konārkku janma
bhumiyākak karuppūreṉṉum perāl kā
ṇi ceytu Itukku Āṭṭaivaṭṭam tāla
ccemmaipoṉ Irupattaiyṅkaḻañ
cu cantrādityaval nilai Iṟaiyāvatākavum nā
m tarañ ceyyumpotu Irupattaiyṅ
kaḻañcu mallatu Eṟkat tarañceyyāta
tākavum Ipparicu candrādittavat kāṇi
yākac ceytu kuṭuttom nāṭṭār niṅ
kaḷum Ipparicu ceytu kuṭuṅkaḷeṉṟaruḷi
cceyya nāṭṭomum Iṉṉāṭṭu Uṟattū
rai paḻamperum paḻaṅkuṭiyum nikki karuppū
reṉṉum peyarākki Āṭṭai vaṭṭam nilai
yiṟai tālaccemmaipoṉ Irupattai
yṅ kaḻañcākki nāṭṭom tarañceyum po
ṉ Irupattaiyṅ kaḻañcu mallatu Eṟatta
rañ ceyyātatākavum I
pparicu karuppūruṭaiya ve
ṅkaṭavaṉ Araṅkaṉāṉa
cempiyaṉ viṟaiṉāṭ
ṭukkoṉārkku janmabhumimiyāka
karuppūreṉṉum peyariṉāl
cantrātittaval kāṇiyāka I
ṟaiyolai ceytu kuṭut
tom kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu nāṭ
ṭom ciṟṟiṟaiyum Aṇa
c
Ivai paḻaveṭṭaraiyaṉ kaṇṭaṉ maṟa
vaṉeṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ipparicu I
cainto marutūruṭaiya kāṭaṉ māṟayaṉe
ṉ Ivai yeṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
